articles.title: Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (July 1)
articles.description:
ABINGTON 451 Lincoln St. One-family raised ranch, built in 1969, 2,667 square feet, 7 rooms, 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, on 47,462-square-foot lot. $875,000 294 Lincoln St. One-family Colonial, built in 1999, 1,632 square feet, 9 rooms, 3 bedrooms, 3 baths, on 29,602-square-foot lot. $785,000 42 Bayberry Road. One-family raised ranch, built in 1974, 1,439 square […]

The post Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (July 1) appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Abington's 451 Lincoln St. sold for $875,000, a raised ranch built in 1969.
294 Lincoln St. in Abington, a Colonial built in 1999, sold for $785,000.
Recent sales indicate a stable housing market in Greater Boston for families.
